name: Profile_R5_Organization_R4
title: Cross-version Profile for R5.Organization resource for use in FHIR R4
description: This cross-version profile allows R5 Organization resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 Organization resources.

element.short: Cross-version Profile for R5.Organization resource for use in FHIR R4
element.definition: This cross-version profile allows R5 Organization resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 Organization resources.

element.short: R5: Additional details about the Organization that could be displayed as further information to identify the Organization beyond its name (new)
element.comment:
Element `Organization.description` has a context of Organization based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Organization`.
Element `Organization.description` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Qualifications, certifications, accreditations, licenses, training, etc. pertaining to the provision of care (new)
element.comment:
Element `Organization.qualification` has a context of Organization based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Organization`.
Element `Organization.qualification` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
